name: Stellar Tony
overview: "Stellar Tony follows sea turtle hero Stellar Tony, alongside friends Hammy, Duncan, Goldie, Sammy, Mr. Crabby, Callie the Clam, Kiri Bridget and Ilee , and Val as they solve mysteries and face off with adversaries Shark and Scott in thrilling underwater adventures!"

trailers.title: STELLAR TONY THE SERIES: OFFICIAL TRAILER
